mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) signals strong labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances despite PAYEMS growth above 100k in the prior month.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in unemployment rate (UNRATE) below 3.5% indicates tight labor market conditions that may trigger inflationary pressures, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as markets price in rate hikes.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when UNRATE is below 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real personal consumption (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates robust demand conditions that drive corporate revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through 2024.
failure_condition: Rank IC for RSAFS-HOUST combination falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60d returns are negative in > 50% of triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) above 2.5% signals monetary tightening that increases discount rates for equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances when FEDFUNDS exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) reflects strong manufacturing activity that boosts corporate profits, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances despite INDPRO growth above 0.5% in the prior month.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI inflation reading (CPIAUCSL) above 2% indicates persistent inflation that may force the Fed to maintain restrictive policy, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances when CPIAUCSL exceeds 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) indicates strong macroeconomic momentum that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through 2024.
failure_condition: Rank IC for GDPC1-INDPRO combination falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 5d returns are negative in > 50% of triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below 100 signals manufacturing contraction that reduces corporate earnings, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days during supply shocks.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances despite INDPRO decline below 100.
